title: A Hidden Plan Advances
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on a hidden plan advances, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: A Hidden Plan Advances. The Straw Hats reach Rainbase while Marines, Baroque Works, and Crocodile’s casino pull every side into the same trap. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey now, I've got no intention of fighting you!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: No it wasn't! You've yet to cut me once!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: You despicable man! How dare you try to make a fool out of me again...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Dammit! I'm just no good dealing with her!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Those're the ones we're looking for! Kill them!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Haha! You think that'll make us stay away!?

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Look! There's the entrance to Rain Dinners!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: The building's built in the middle of the lake...!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Is no one else here yet!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: There they are! Kill those 2 first!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I let her run on ahead. Why, is she still not here!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Then we should hurry up ins-

summary: This part develops a hidden plan advances and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
